name: Mythallar Cloak
description:
This electric-blue cloak is studded with sewn-in crystals that are shards of a decommissioned mythallar. The cloak has 10 charges and regains {@dice 1d10} expended charges daily at dawn.
While wearing the cloak, you can take a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB} and expend 1 charge to activate the cloak's magic. The magic lasts for 1 minute or until you end it early (no action required).
While the cloak's magic is active, you gain a {@variantrule Fly Speed|XPHB} of 30 feet and can hover. Additional
